title: morella pilulifera
intro: Morella pilulifera, also known as the American bayberry or bayberry, is a shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its high content of myricetin, a flavonoid with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Morella pilulifera include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves for various health purposes.
